title: notify: Notifier port + Telegram sendMessage, watcher-fed at-least-once delivery
action: Notifier port (async trait send(pane,kind,body)). TelegramNotifier: reqwest POST to Bot API sendMessage using HERDCTL_TELEGRAM_TOKEN + configured chat id; bot token env-only, never logged. NullNotifier (logs) for demo. NotifyService: consumes watcher StatusChanges for blocked/done, enqueues in Store, drains outbox at-least-once (mark_delivered only after successful send). Redact outbound via security::redact. Test with a recording fake notifier + MemoryStore.

prohibitions: No bot token in config or logs
No mark_delivered before a successful send

verify: cargo test --quiet notify && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Notify port + Telegram channel: Notifier trait, TelegramNotifier (Bot API sendMessage, token env-only never logged), NullNotifier, NotifyService bridging watcher StatusChanges (blocked/done only) to Store with at-least-once delivery (enqueue→send→mark), outbound redacted. Wired into main.rs watcher loop. Committed 1ab1f7c.
trace.verification_evidence: 6 notify tests pass: only_blocked_and_done_are_recorded, drain_delivers_and_marks, failed_send_stays_pending_then_redelivers (at-least-once proof), outbound_body_is_redacted, telegram gating. clippy -D warnings clean. 74 tests total.
trace.verify_output: 6 notify tests: only blocked/done recorded, drain delivers+marks, failed send stays pending then redelivers (at-least-once), outbound redacted, telegram token/chat gating; clippy clean; 74 total
trace.verify_command: cargo test notify && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
